json_ld_data.name: Kyanite Lightweight Jacket Men's
json_ld_data.description: Light, versatile stretch fleece jacket with exceptional next-to-skin comfort.
json_ld_data.material: Body:  Torrent™ - Jersey knit peached face with brushed back, 185gsm - 84% Polyester, 16% Elastane, Origin of fabric: TAIWAN, CHINA, Origin of dyeing: TAIWAN, CHINA, Origin of Manufacture: VIETNAM, May release plastic microfibres into the environment when washing

hasVariant.name: Kyanite Lightweight Jacket Men's, Fluidity, Size S
hasVariant.description: This is one you pack for everything. Perfect for cutting the chill in cool conditions – or high output in colder weather – the packable, comfortable, Kyanite Lightweight Jacket provides measured warmth for a range of activities and adventures. Light, breathable, and incredibly soft, the Torrent™ fleece manages moisture and stretches for unrestricted freedom. An anti-odour finish keeps it fresh on long trips. The fit is streamlined, and the minimalist design is clean and focused.
